vehicle.label: Tiltrotor VTOL Hybrid
vehicle.desc: Fixed-wing VTOL with 2 tilting rotor nacelles, BVLOS long-range capable

parts.label: Center Fuselage Spine
parts.spec: CFRP box beam center fuselage, avionics bay, wing spar socket, front GPS boom mount, belly camera window

parts.label: Main Wing (2-piece)
parts.spec: Straight wing, 4S NACA 2412, dual 15mm CFRP spar, 900mm half-span, 160mm chord, 3-layer CFRP skin

parts.label: Nacelle Assembly x 2
parts.spec: Tilting nacelle assembly, 0-90deg tilt axis, 6309 bearing set, servo-driven worm gear, motor and ESC pocket

parts.label: Tilt Servo + Linkage x 2
parts.spec: 25kg-cm DS3218 servo per nacelle, titanium pushrod, dual ball joints, tilt range 0-93deg, crash-tolerant

parts.label: V-Tail x 2 (Ruddervator)
parts.spec: +-35deg V-tail ruddervator pair, MG996R servo each, 30deg dihedral, CFRP sandwich panel, hinge piano wire

parts.label: Landing Gear (Tri)
parts.spec: Tricycle landing gear, spring-steel skid arms, 55mm dia wheels, CG at 1/3 chord, 200mm wheelbase

parts.label: Battery Bay (Slide-In)
parts.spec: Belly slide-in battery bay, 6S 8000mAh Li-ion pack, Velcro + strap dual retention, CG position 28% MAC

parts.label: Payload Nose Bay
parts.spec: Interchangeable nose payload bay, Day/IR camera gimbal or survey sensor, 80x60x50mm, 300g payload limit

parts.label: Tilt-Axis Harness + Datum Service Bay
parts.spec: Tiltrotor integration_service module with tilt-axis harness_channel, slack_loop, interface_datum, service_hatch, connector keying, and nacelle-to-wing load-path inspection access

requirements: Center Fuselage Spine for Tiltrotor VTOL Hybrid
Wing spar socket, avionics bay, GPS boom mount, belly camera window
Fixed-wing VTOL with 2 tilting rotor nacelles

risk.desc: Potential structural integrity issues if nacelle loads are not properly transferred through the spar_socket.
risk.mit: Conduct detailed structural analysis to ensure load paths are correctly designed.

risk.desc: Insufficient clearance for wing spar socket may cause assembly issues.
risk.mit: Review and adjust clearance to ensure proper fit and assembly.

risk.desc: Cooling airflow may be compromised if cooling duct is not properly sized.
risk.mit: Verify cooling duct dimensions and airflow requirements to ensure proper cooling.

risk.desc: Vent holes may not provide adequate pressure relief if improperly sized.
risk.mit: Review vent hole dimensions to ensure proper pressure relief.

physics_paths.description: Nacelle loads are transferred through the spar_socket into the fuselage_spine
Cooling airflow through the avionics bay
Heat dissipation from avionics into the fuselage structure
Tilt axis rotation clearance for nacelle tilt mechanism
Pressure relief for avionics bay through vent holes
Electrical harness and data cable routing through harness_pass_through
Service access for camera and GPS through belly_camera_window and front_gps_boom_mount

integration_opportunities.description: Service access for camera and GPS through belly_camera_window and front_gps_boom_mount

manufacturing_strategy.datum: Primary locating faces, rail guides, axis rings, spar sockets, or mating pads
manufacturing_strategy.tolerance: ±0.1mm for critical interfaces, ±0.2mm for general features
manufacturing_strategy.support: Support structures will be removed post-printing
manufacturing_strategy.inspection: Inspection will include dimensional checks, surface finish, and material integrity

verification_focus.description: Verify critical joint interfaces meet specified clearance and fit
Verify structural integrity under specified load conditions

risk.desc: Potential misalignment of wing spar sockets during assembly.
risk.mit: Implement a precise alignment tool for assembly.

risk.desc: Risk of insufficient clearance for service access.
risk.mit: Review and adjust clearance dimensions for service access.

risk.desc: Potential for thermal expansion issues in composite materials.
risk.mit: Conduct thermal expansion analysis and adjust design as necessary.

risk.desc: Risk of improper preload or torque application in fasteners.
risk.mit: Develop a standardized torque and preload application procedure.

risk.desc: Risk of aerodynamic performance degradation due to surface imperfections.
risk.mit: Implement strict quality control measures for surface finish.
